IAT 201 — Group Project

SFU 2026

Print & Play Files

Downloadable assets for Ark Ascension. Print, cut, and assemble your own copy.

Galactic Central Board

The main 20-tile circular board. Print on A2 or larger for best results.

Files coming soon — check back after final production.

Race Boards (All 5 Factions)

Individual Race Boards for Turian, Asari, Krogan, Salarian, and Human. Includes 10-slot Ark Construction Track.

Files coming soon — check back after final production.

Card Decks

Action Deck (30 cards), Sabotage Deck (20 cards), Solar Penalty Deck (10 cards). Print on cardstock.

Files coming soon — check back after final production.

Resource Tokens

Metal, Fuel, and Crystal resource tokens. Cut and stack for physical play.

Files coming soon — check back after final production.

Rulebook (Printable)

Full printable rulebook PDF — Game Setup, Race Board Details, Turn Sequence, and Win Conditions.

Files coming soon — check back after final production.

All files will be released under a Creative Commons non-commercial license.

IAT 201 — Simon Fraser University · 2026
